name_jp: 強化拡張パック「ナイトユニゾン」

box_guarantees._source: https://pokemoncard.co.kr/card/166 (Korean 20-pack, 8-card product configuration); https://www.pokemon-card.com/products/sm/sm9a.html/1000 (Japanese product guarantees one SR-or-higher per box). The Korean database contains a complete 40-card C/U mirror subset; one mirror slot per pack and adjacent late Sun & Moon RR/TR rates are transparent estimates because Korean official pull rates are private.
